ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati Academy in 1683, where he acted as secretary in 1697-98, and as prince of the Academy in 1712-13. In 1690 Guarini delivered a presentation in the Ricovrati Academy with the title `Se in buona legge d`amore sia lecito amare vari oggetti in un medesimo tempo`. He contributed with a couplet to the collection dedicated to Elisabetta Querini Valiera (Bologna 1695).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
